title: hedeoma serpyllifolia
intro: Hedeoma serpyllifolia, also known as pennyroyal, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and menstrual cramps, due to its antispasmodic and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of pennyroyal include relief from nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to repel insects and improve mental clarity. Pennyroyal can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or in aromatherapy.
